name: trap-decline-funnel
description: Trap: funnel chart is unsupported, should explain and render alternative
messages: Create a funnel chart showing the conversion from orders to revenue across categories
rubric: Funnel charts are not supported. The CORRECT response is to acknowledge this limitation and render a reasonable alternative (e.g. sorted horizontal bar chart). Score high if model explains the limitation and renders a good alternative. Only score low if model renders something misleadingly labeled as a funnel or produces garbage output.
